new_articles.title: Samsung to get jump on Apple’s first foldable with new phones in July
new_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Samsung to get jump on Apple’s first foldable with new phones in July'이다. Samsung Electronics will host its next Galaxy Unpacked event on July 22. ST PHOTO: NG SOR LUAN Published Jul 08, 2026, 07:42 AM Updated Jul 08, 2026, 07:45 AM New York – Samsung Electronics will host its next Galaxy Unpacked event on July 22, when the leading foldable phone maker is expected to unveil a Galaxy Z Fold 8 with a shorter and wider design that resembles Apple’s planned folding iPhone The Unpacked event will be in London, according to an invite that Samsung sent to media on July 7 During its presentation, the company will introduce a slate of devices likely to include three foldable phones, along with wearables such as a smartwatch and clip-on wireless earbuds. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: Chip stocks sell off after Samsung earnings fall short of high AI bar
new_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Chip stocks sell off after Samsung earnings fall short of high AI bar'이다. Samsung Electronics' results weren't enough to please investors after stock's 145% run up. It's the latest sign that beating results isn't enough to please investors in the AI revolution Chinese AI startup Deepseek is reportedly building its own chip to sidestep U In this article SOXX SKHY KS11 SSUN-FF TER MRVL watch now VIDEO 2:28 02:28 Samsung shares slide despite profit exceeding Nvidia and Apple TechCheck Investors dumped semiconductor stocks on Tuesday after results from Samsung Electronics failed to meet Wall Street's lofty artificial intelligence demand expectations Shares dropped 8% even after the South Korean electronics company's quarterly profit surpassed both Nvidia and Apple , and the company said it expects operating profit to jump 1,800% The results are the latest sign on Wall Street that sometimes beating results isn't enough to please investors in the AI revolution. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: Samsung Electronics profits surge 1,800% annually amid artificial intelligence spending boom
new_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Samsung Electronics profits surge 1,800% annually amid artificial intelligence spending boom'이다. South Korean chipmaker Samsung Electronics posted record quarterly profits Tuesday thanks to the global AI infrastructure buildout coupled with a memory chip shortage. Also in this edition, oil futures rise as tensions reignite in the Hormuz Strait and Canada commits to its biggest-ever defence contract. Finally, Cuba experiences its third nationwide blackout of the year as its fuel reserves dwindle. matched_articles.title: Samsung loses over $100bn in market value despite record AI-driven profit
matched_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Samsung loses over $100bn in market value despite record AI-driven profit'이다. Samsung Electronics has forecast a nineteen-fold leap in quarterly profit, its third record quarter in a row, yet investors responded by wiping more than $100 billion (€87. 5bn) off the company's value amid doubts over how long the AI-driven memory boom can last. The South Korean technology giant Samsung said on Tuesday it expects operating profit of about 89. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: Synopsys to cut chip fab manufacturing control software in shift to AI design
matched_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics, SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Synopsys to cut chip fab manufacturing control software in shift to AI design'이다. Synopsys plans to stop offering manufacturing process control software. This move allows the company to divert resources to higher-margin AI design offerings. Chipmakers like Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix were informed about the end-of-life decision. Affected products include automation software that monitors fabrication plant anomalies. Some chipmakers are developing their own in-house manufacturing tools. Chipmakers like Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix were informed about the end-of-life decision chip design giant Synopsys plans to stop offering a suite of manufacturing process control software used by global semiconductor makers, six sources briefed on the matter said, as it seeks to divert resources to higher-margin offerings such as AI design Synopsys in April and May informed more than 10 chipmakers including Samsung Electronics , SK Hynix , Kioxia Holdings Corp and Qorvo Inc about the "end of life" move that means Synopsys will not provide future new versions and will only carry out maintenance obligations, two of the sources said Samsung had established compatible alternatives and there would be "no negative impact on production," the spokesperson said when asked if production yields could ​decline SK Hynix declined to comment.

matched_articles.title: 韓国 サムスン電子 4月～6月営業利益は前年同期比 約19倍
matched_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 '韓国 サムスン電子 4月～6月営業利益は前年同期比 約19倍'이다. 韓国のサムスン電子は先月までの3か月間の決算を発表し、本業のもうけを示す営業利益は前の年の同じ時期と比べておよそ19倍になり、3か月ごとの決算で過去最高を更新しました。 AI需要の拡大を背景に半導体事業が業績を押し上げたとみられます。 韓国 サムスン電子 4月～6月営業利益は前年同期比 約19倍 2026年7月7日 15:21 韓国 韓国のサムスン電子は先月までの3か月間の決算を発表し、本業のもうけを示す営業利益は前の年の同じ時期と比べておよそ19倍になり、3か月ごとの決算で過去最高を更新しました。 31年ぶりの熱狂がつないだもの 7月6日 10:11 知っていますか？ 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: Hanwha Ocean shares sink 23% as it loses bid to build Canada's next fleet of submarines
matched_articles.summary: Hanwha Ocean 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Hanwha Ocean shares sink 23% as it loses bid to build Canada's next fleet of submarines'이다. Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney announced Monday that Germany's Thyssenkrupp Marine Systems would be the preferred supplier for delivering the submarines. In this article TKA-FF TKA-FF TKMS-DE YANTAI, CHINA - OCTOBER 27 2025: Ships are seen under construction at Hanwha Ocean Shandong Co in Yantai, Shandong province, eastern China, on Monday, Oct -based subsidiaries of the South Korean company Hanwha Ocean have been put on China's sanction list to punish its role in prompting the United States to impose additional fees on Chinese shippers and shipbuilders That is expected to be a setback to Hanwha Ocean, as the contract was estimated to be up to $100 billion over three decades, according to The Korea Times South Korean President Lee Jae Myung said on his Facebook page that although the results were not as expected in this Canadian submarine project, "challenges inevitably bring both successes and disappointments. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.
